phrases.text_local: Conhece um restaurante típico perto daqui?
phrases.pronunciation: koo-NYEH-sih OONNG rehsh-tow-RAHNNG-tih TEE-pee-koo PEHR-too duh-KEE?

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao pessoal do balcão de informações na sala de espera; eles podem recomendar opções locais.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW pih-SOOAHL DOO bahl-KOWN DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH NUH SAH-luh DIH SHPEH-ruh; EH-lihsh PAW-dayng reh-koo-mayng-DAHR awp-SOHNYSH loo-KEYESH.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the staff at the information desk in the waiting hall; they can recommend local options.

responses.english: Ask the staff at the information desk in the waiting hall; they can recommend local options.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW pih-SOOAHL DOO bahl-KOWN DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH NUH SAH-luh DIH SHPEH-ruh; EH-lihsh PAW-dayng reh-koo-mayng-DAHR awp-SOHNYSH loo-KEYESH.
responses.french: Pergunte ao pessoal do balcão de informações na sala de espera; eles podem recomendar opções locais.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Plataforma 1.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH pluh-tuh-FAW-ruh-muh OOM.

responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH pluh-tuh-FAW-ruh-muh OOM.
responses.french: Siga as placas para a Plataforma 1.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica a bilheteira da CP?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh DUH seh-PEH?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Bilheteira CP.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh seh-PEH.
likely_response.translation_en: Where is the CP ticket shop? Follow the signs to the CP ticket shop.

responses.english: Where is the CP ticket shop? Follow the signs to the CP ticket shop.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh seh-PEH.
responses.french: Siga as placas para a Bilheteira CP.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to validate paper tickets
phrases.text_local: Onde valido os bilhetes em papel?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih vuh-LEE-doo OOSH bee-LYEH-tihsh AYNG puh-PEHL?
phrases.cultural_note: In Portugal, paper tickets must be physically stamped before boarding to avoid fines. Validators are typically positioned near main entrances or waiting areas.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para os validadores.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh OOSH vuh-lee-duh-DOH-rihsh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the validators.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the validators.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh OOSH vuh-lee-duh-DOH-rihsh.
responses.french: Siga as placas para os validadores.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to wait for the train
phrases.cultural_note: The Sala de Espera is the traditional waiting hall, a stable landmark in the station.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, aguarde na Sala de Espera.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, uhg-WAH-ruh-dih NUH SAH-luh DIH SHPEH-ruh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, wait in the Waiting Hall.

responses.english: Good morning, wait in the Waiting Hall.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, uhg-WAH-ruh-dih NUH SAH-luh DIH SHPEH-ruh.
responses.french: Bom dia, aguarde na Sala de Espera.
